app_tagline: Local-first email with per-account AI agents
onboarding_body: Add your first account to start syncing mail locally.
dash_desc: Overview of your accounts, agents, and recent decisions.
pending_desc: Decisions and drafts that need your attention.
gte_desc: Local semantic index status and reindexing.
team_desc: The shared Agent-IM channel where you and your agents coordinate.
repository_desc: Knowledge index and the agent decision log.
mail_detail_desc: A single thread and its messages.
agents_desc: Configure each account's agent, role, and AI Reply Mode.
acct_delete_confirm_body: This removes the local copy of this account's mail and attachments.
acct_delete_last: You can't remove your only account.
acct_signout_mbx_body: This removes {email} and its local copy from this device. Your SeekerMail ID and other mailboxes are unaffected.
acct_remove_failed: Couldn't remove this mailbox — please try again.
acct_signout_id_body: This signs you out of your SeekerMail ID on this device. Your mailboxes and local mail stay exactly where they are — only the cloud identity session ends.
acct_signout_id_error: Couldn't sign out. Please try again.
smid_caption: Your optional identity, independent of any mailbox. Mail and the local index stay on this device — only identity, license, and optional encrypted settings ever sync.
smid_signed_out: Not signed in — optional; sign in to sync license & settings
smid_marketing_optin: Email me occasional product updates and tips (unsubscribe anytime)
smid_signin_pending: Sign-in didn't complete — please try again.
acct_reauth_prompt: Enter the updated password to reconnect.
wizard_oauth_authorizing_hint: A browser window opened — sign in and approve access. SeekerMail finishes automatically; if it doesn't, paste the authorization code below.
gmailGuide_title: Gmail needs a free App Password
gmailGuide_intro: Gmail won't accept your normal password in other apps. Create a free 16-character App Password — about two minutes, just once.
gmailGuide_prereq: First turn on 2-Step Verification (Google Account → Security). App Passwords only appear once it is on.
gmailGuide_step1: Open the App Passwords page below, and sign in again if Google asks.
gmailGuide_step2: Type a name you'll recognize, such as SeekerMail, then select Create.
gmailGuide_step3: Copy the 16-character code and paste it into the Password field above.
gmailGuide_trouble_a: 2-Step Verification isn't on yet — turn it on first, then reload the App Passwords page.
gmailGuide_wrong_a: Make sure you pasted the 16-character App Password, not your normal Gmail password.
depth_title: How far back should this agent learn?
depth_large_warning: This will download a large amount of mail and may take a while.
tracker_panel_allow_sender: Always show images from this sender
images_blocked_notice: Remote images load from the sender's server, which can reveal that you opened this email. SeekerMail fetches them privately — no cookies or identifying headers — only when you load them.
mail_body_truncated: Email too large — showing first {sizeKb} KB
